name: Julienne Beets with Horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain beets, reserving liquid. Set liquid aside.
2. Slice beets into julienne strips; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the beet liquid, sugar, vinegar, cornstarch, lemon juice, and salt. Stir well.
4. Cook over medium heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Add horseradish and butter to the saucepan, stirring until the butter melts.
6. Gently stir in the beets and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the mixture is thoroughly heated.
8. Serve each portion with a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
